entryPointCandidates.name: README.md
entryPointCandidates.summary: Primary project README documenting EdPath end to end: product flow, tech stack, system and LangGraph agent architecture, setup, local run instructions, environment variables, persistence, and evals.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: LLM-as-judge evaluators scoring plan/MCQ grounding, assist-firewall leakage, and summary quality, gated behind OpenAI configuration.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Barrel aggregating all eval case suites and providing filter/lookup helpers for selecting cases to run.

entryPointCandidates.name: app.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Assembles the Express application: CORS, JSON parsing, health check, the /upload and /start routes, and the mounted CopilotKit runtime endpoint.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Process entry point that creates the Express app and starts the HTTP server listening on the configured port.

documentation.name: AGENTS.md
documentation.summary: Canonical always-on agent rules read by Claude Code and Cursor: defines what EdPath is, the non-negotiable workflow constraints, the tech stack, and a doc map routing each task to the single relevant reference doc.

documentation.name: CLAUDE.md
documentation.summary: Thin Claude Code entry document that imports AGENTS.md as the single source of agent rules, reserving this file only for Claude-specific guidance that does not belong in the shared rules.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Primary project README documenting EdPath end to end: product flow, tech stack, system and LangGraph agent architecture, setup, local run instructions, environment variables, persistence, and evals.

documentation.name: AGENTS.md
documentation.summary: Web-app-scoped agent rules warning that this Next.js version has breaking changes and directing agents to read the bundled Next.js docs before writing code.

documentation.name: CLAUDE.md
documentation.summary: Thin Claude-specific entry point for the web app that simply imports the shared AGENTS.md rules so guidance lives in a single source.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Overview of the EdPath Next.js front end covering its role as a CopilotKit CoAgent mirror of LangGraph state, a folder map, and the high-level upload-to-summary lesson flow.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Index for the docs/architecture folder, pointing to the canonical reference docs and describing the living code-level maps (repo-map, system-overview) that fill in as the build progresses.

documentation.name: repo-map.md
documentation.summary: Comprehensive code-level map of the EdPath monorepo: end-to-end upload-to-summary flow, backend/web directory maps, graph node IDs, packages, env vars, test/eval entrypoints, and a quick-lookup index of where every concern lives in the code.

documentation.name: system-overview.md
documentation.summary: Intentional pointer stub that redirects readers to the canonical system-architecture and agent-architecture reference docs and to repo-map.md, avoiding a duplicated overview that would drift.

documentation.name: agent-architecture.md
documentation.summary: Locked reference for the LangGraph agent design, walking six gates from the agent-level contract through the graph's state object, nodes, edges, interrupts/resume, structured-output ACI contracts, and the reliability spine (bounded loops, failure recovery, tracing, human checkpoint, evals).

documentation.name: architecture.md
documentation.summary: Locked reference for EdPath's system architecture: the system-level contract, workflow-not-agent control flow, components and data flow, the CopilotKit bridge, storage (LangGraph Postgres checkpointer), responsibility boundaries, and the locked stack.

documentation.name: design-decisions.md
documentation.summary: The canonical log of locked product-behavior decisions: 6 closed philosophy decisions, 24 load-bearing/remaining flow decisions, 9 numeric bounds, and the architecture edits those locks flag in architecture.md and agent-architecture.md.

documentation.name: backend.mdc
documentation.summary: Cursor rule file scoping backend-specific agent guidance for the edpath-backend Express + LangGraph app.

documentation.name: core.mdc
documentation.summary: Always-on Cursor core rules that route to AGENTS.md and enforce docs-first, deterministic-workflow, no-scope-creep working style.

documentation.name: schemas.mdc
documentation.summary: Cursor rule file guiding work on the shared packages/schemas Zod contracts used by both backend and web.

documentation.name: web.mdc
documentation.summary: Cursor rule file scoping frontend-specific agent guidance for the Next.js edpath-web app.

config.name: env.ts
config.summary: Centralized, validated environment configuration for the backend (ports, upload limits, OpenAI and LangSmith settings) plus feature-detection helpers.

config.name: langgraph.json
config.summary: LangGraph CLI registration config that declares the 'edpath-agent' graph, pointing to the compiled graph export in the backend and wiring in the backend .env file.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Root monorepo manifest defining npm workspaces (apps/*, packages/*), Turbo-driven build/dev/lint/test scripts, the LangGraph dev command, and shared dev dependencies like Turbo, TypeScript, and Prettier.

config.name: turbo.json
config.summary: Turborepo pipeline configuration defining the task graph and caching for build, lint, check-types, test, and dev across the monorepo workspaces.

config.name: .env.example
config.summary: Environment variable template for the EdPath backend, documenting runtime config for the server (NODE_ENV, PORT), LangGraph deployment, OpenAI models, LangSmith tracing, and PDF upload guardrail limits.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Manifest for the edpath-backend Express service, declaring dev/build/start/test/eval scripts and dependencies including LangGraph, CopilotKit runtime, LangChain OpenAI, Express, multer, and pdfjs-dist.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the backend, extending the shared @repo/typescript-config base and emitting compiled output from src to dist targeting ES2022 with Node types.

config.name: components.json
config.summary: shadcn/ui configuration selecting the radix-nova style with RSC/TSX, Tailwind CSS variables, the lucide icon set, and import aliases for components, ui, lib, and hooks.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for the edpath-web Next.js app declaring dev/build/test scripts and dependencies including Next 16, React 19, CopilotKit, Radix UI, Tailwind, and workspace packages @repo/schemas, @repo/tokens, and @repo/types.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the web app enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution, the Next.js plugin, and the @/* path alias mapped to the app root.

config.name: base.json
config.summary: Base shared TypeScript compiler configuration for the monorepo, enabling strict mode, NodeNext module resolution, declaration output, and safety flags like noUncheckedIndexedAccess; all preset tsconfigs extend it.

config.name: nextjs.json
config.summary: TypeScript preset for Next.js applications that extends base.json, switching to ESNext/Bundler resolution, enabling the Next plugin, JSX preserve mode, allowJs, and noEmit for the framework build.

config.name: react-library.json
config.summary: TypeScript preset for React library packages that extends base.json and sets JSX to the react-jsx runtime transform.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for the private @repo/typescript-config workspace package that ships the shared tsconfig presets to the rest of the monorepo.

config.name: .understandignore
config.summary: Ignore-pattern configuration for the Understand-Anything analyzer, excluding build artifacts and vendored paths from the knowledge-graph scan.

config.name: vitest.config.ts
config.summary: Vitest configuration for the backend test suite, registering the setup file and excluding dist and node_modules from test runs.

config.name: vitest.setup.ts
config.summary: Vitest global setup that loads .env and forces deterministic test defaults by disabling LangSmith tracing and blanking the OpenAI key unless EVAL_LLM is set.

config.name: eslint.config.mjs
config.summary: ESLint flat config for the Next.js web app, wiring the lint ruleset that governs the frontend codebase.

config.name: next.config.ts
config.summary: Next.js framework configuration for the edpath-web app controlling build and runtime behavior.

config.name: postcss.config.mjs
config.summary: PostCSS configuration enabling the Tailwind/CSS processing pipeline for the web app's styles.

config.name: vitest.config.mts
config.summary: Vitest test-runner configuration for the web app, defining the test environment, aliases, and coverage setup.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for the shared @repo/schemas workspace package, declaring the Zod dependency and the exports surface consumed by web and backend.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared schemas package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for the design-tokens package, marking it private and exporting the tokens.css stylesheet for consumers.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Package manifest for the shared types package, declaring its export surface, build script, and the @repo/schemas dependency that its inferred contract types re-export.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared types package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.

list.name: Frontend UI
list.description: Next.js App Router pages, the landing/quiz/plan/summary/shell widgets, shadcn UI primitives, React hooks, client lib helpers, and view-model types for the EdPath learner experience.

list.name: CopilotKit-LangGraph Bridge
list.description: The CoAgent wiring that connects the React frontend to the LangGraph agent - the backend CopilotKit Runtime endpoint plus the web-side Copilot provider and shared state bridge.

list.name: Agent Teaching Workflow Core
list.description: The deterministic LangGraph teaching graph - nodes, edges, state annotation, prompts, and agent lib driving the Plan, Approve, Quiz loop, and Summarize flow with code-owned control flow.

list.name: Backend API & Ingestion
list.description: The Express host, PDF upload/clean/extract ingestion, the start route/service, and initial-state assembly that bootstrap a lesson before handing off to the agent.

list.name: Evals & Test Harness
list.description: The Vitest and LangSmith evaluation harness that scores agent nodes (plan, MCQ, grading, hints, summary) against PDF-grounded fixtures and assist-firewall/quality assertions.

list.name: Shared Contracts & Packages
list.description: Cross-cutting monorepo packages - Zod schema contracts, branded ID/Phase/CoAgent-state types, and design tokens - serving as the single source of truth for both ends.

list.name: Configuration
list.description: Build, tooling, and environment configuration - package/tsconfig manifests, Vitest/ESLint/PostCSS/Next configs, shared tsconfig presets, and env examples across all workspaces.

list.name: Documentation
list.description: Reference architecture docs, per-directory READMEs, agent rule files, and design/assets notes that document EdPath workflow, boundaries, and locked decisions.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/mcq/Widg.name: WidgetActions.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/mcq/Widg.summary: Renders the MCQ action buttons (submit, retry, advance) whose visibility is driven by selection state and grading feedback.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/plan/Pla.summary: Presentational header for the plan widget showing the PDF title and current plan phase.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/plan/Pla.summary: Renders a single learning objective row within the plan, including its title and metadata badges.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/plan/Pla.name: PlanReviseChat.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/plan/Pla.summary: Chat interface for requesting plan revisions, managing a local message thread, draft submission, and suggested prompts during the HITL approval step.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/plan/Pla.name: PlanWidget.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/plan/Pla.summary: Composes the plan approval widget from header, objective items, and action bar, mapping plan objectives for the HITL review.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Ap.name: AppShell.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Ap.summary: Shared application shell providing the header, mode label, and layout frame that wraps landing and lesson content.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Le.name: LessonErrorBanner.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Le.summary: Displays a lesson-level error message with a retry affordance when the workflow encounters a failure.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Ob.name: ObjectiveRail.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Ob.summary: Side rail showing the lesson objectives with progress, current-objective highlighting, question counts, and generating/error states.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/summary/.summary: Presentational summary tile rendering the overall lesson score as a rounded percentage.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/summary/.summary: Renders a per-objective breakdown table of the lesson summary with rounded percentage scores.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/summary/.summary: Call-to-action button on the summary screen prompting the user to restart with a new PDF lesson.

file:apps/edpath-web/api/start-api.ts.summary: Frontend API client that starts a lesson by POSTing the uploaded PDF plus a thread id to the backend, then Zod-validates the upload result.

file:apps/edpath-web/api/upload-api.ts.name: upload-api.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/api/upload-api.ts.summary: Frontend API client that uploads a PDF to the backend and validates the response against the shared UploadResult schema.

file:apps/edpath-web/app/layout.tsx.name: layout.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/app/layout.tsx.summary: Next.js App Router root layout defining page metadata, fonts, and the global HTML/body shell for the EdPath web app.

file:apps/edpath-web/app/page.tsx.name: page.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/app/page.tsx.summary: Next.js landing route that composes the app shell, hero, and upload card as the entry screen of the lesson flow.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/landing/.summary: Presentational hero section for the landing page describing the PDF-to-lesson flow in a numbered steps list.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/landing/.summary: Tone-aware banner that surfaces upload status and error messages beneath the upload card.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/mcq/Feed.summary: Renders the green/red functional feedback banner for an answered MCQ, conveying correctness and conceptual hints.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/mcq/Help.summary: The bounded 'help me' side-channel chat: renders a threaded help conversation with typewriter animation and a draft input that never receives the correct answer.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/summary/.summary: Composes the end-of-lesson summary screen from the overall score, per-objective table, study tips, and restart CTA sub-components.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/config/env..summary: Centralized, validated environment configuration for the backend (ports, upload limits, OpenAI and LangSmith settings) plus feature-detection helpers.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/copilot/edp.summary: Unit tests for the EdPathLangGraphAgent bridge, verifying state snapshot handling and stream preparation against the LangGraph deployment client.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/sync-.summary: CLI script that syncs local eval scenarios into a LangSmith dataset, creating the dataset and uploading examples for offline evaluation.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/st.name: start.route.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/st.summary: Express route for POST /start: validates the thread id, processes the uploaded PDF, and seeds a new LangGraph lesson thread, mapping domain errors to HTTP status codes.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/st.name: start.service.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/st.summary: Unit tests for startLesson covering thread-id validation, upload rejection propagation, deployment errors, and already-started conflicts.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/st.name: start.service.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/st.summary: Orchestrates lesson start: validates the thread id, processes the PDF upload, builds initial graph state, and seeds the LangGraph thread with it.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: build-initial-state.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Constructs the initial EdPath LangGraph state object from a successful upload result, embedding cleaned pdfText as the grounding source.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: pdf-clean.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Normalizes raw extracted PDF text (line endings, whitespace, blank lines) and estimates its token cost for downstream prompt-budget checks.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: pdf-extract.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Extracts text from a PDF buffer using pdfjs-dist, concatenating per-page text and classifying extraction failures into typed error kinds.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: test-fixtures.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Shared test fixtures providing base64-encoded valid, no-text-layer, corrupt, and non-PDF buffers for upload and start tests.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: upload-middleware.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Multer-based upload middleware plus helpers to build size limits, validate the Zod upload result before sending, and translate multer errors into structured responses.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: upload.route.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Integration tests for the POST /upload route covering valid PDFs, oversized files, and non-PDF rejections against the Express app.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: upload.route.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Express route for POST /upload: runs the multer middleware, processes the PDF via the upload service, and returns a validated upload result.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: upload.service.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Exhaustive unit tests for processUpload covering filename sanitization, size and page limits, PDF magic-byte checks, extraction failures, and token budgeting.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: upload.service.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Core upload pipeline: sanitizes the filename, enforces size/magic-byte/page/token limits, extracts and cleans PDF text, and returns a validated upload result or typed rejection.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.name: upload.types.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/features/up.summary: Local types and interfaces for the upload feature (upload input, limits, rejection reasons, and PDF metadata) used across route and service.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/index.ts.summary: Process entry point that creates the Express app and starts the HTTP server listening on the configured port.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/lib/langgra.name: deployment-client.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/lib/langgra.summary: Wraps the LangGraph deployment SDK client to create lesson threads and seed their initial state, throwing typed errors for already-started threads and deployment failures.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.name: source-anchor.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.summary: Unit tests validating that the source-anchoring check correctly detects whether an MCQ source quote is grounded in the PDF text.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.name: source-anchor.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.summary: Deterministic grounding verifier that normalizes and tokenizes a source quote and checks whether a contiguous token run appears in the PDF text.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.name: structured-generate.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.summary: Unit tests for the structured generation helper covering JSON extraction, schema validation, and repair-retry behavior with a mocked LLM client.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.name: structured-generate.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/s.summary: Generic structured-output helper that invokes the LLM, extracts JSON from the response, validates it against a Zod schema, and retries with repair prompts on failure.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: advance.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Graph node that advances the quiz loop to the next MCQ or objective and routes onward to await-input, generate-mcq, or summarize.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: approval-gate.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: HITL interrupt node that pauses the graph to present the lesson plan and resumes on a validated approve/revise decision.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: assist.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Bounded help side-channel node that answers a learner's question about the current MCQ through the assist firewall, never receiving the correct answer.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: await-input.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Interrupt node that pauses the quiz loop to await a learner's answer, help request, or advance signal and validates the resumed payload.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: feedback.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Graph node that assembles the green/red functional feedback payload (explanation on correct, conceptual hint on incorrect) for the graded MCQ.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/__fix.name: pdf-text.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/__fix.summary: Test fixture exporting a canonical PDF text sample, its metadata, and a known source quote used to ground unit tests for the agent pipeline.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/__fix.name: stubs.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/__fix.summary: Test fixture factory producing deterministic stub lesson plans and MCQ batches so graph tests can run without invoking the LLM.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/edpat.name: edpath-graph.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/edpat.summary: End-to-end integration tests driving the compiled LangGraph workflow through plan, approval, quiz loop, and summarize using stubbed LLM nodes.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/graph.name: graph-routing.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/graph.summary: Unit tests for the deterministic conditional-edge routing functions that decide the next node in the teaching workflow.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/graph.name: graph.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/graph.summary: Core StateGraph definition wiring all teaching nodes, deterministic conditional edges, and two interrupt gates into the compiled EdPath LangGraph workflow.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/a.name: assist-input.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/a.summary: Builds the assist side-channel input and enforces the structural firewall that strips correctIndex, explanation, hint, and sourceQuote before the help node sees the question.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/g.name: grade-answer.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/g.summary: Unit tests verifying the deterministic grading function correctly compares a submitted answer index against the correct index.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/g.name: grade-answer.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/g.summary: Deterministic answer grading in pure code (never the LLM): compares the selected option index to the correct index and raises a GradingError on invalid input.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/l.name: client.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/l.summary: OpenAI/LangChain LLM client factory with token clamping, an override hook for tests, and model selectors for plan, default, and plan-escape generation.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/p.name: parse-mcq-batch.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/lib/p.summary: Normalizes and safe-parses raw LLM MCQ batch output into the validated MCQ batch schema, tolerating loose array/object shapes from the model.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evals.name: evals.integration.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evals.summary: Vitest integration test that drives the eval suite against the real LangGraph workflow with plan/MCQ stubs toggled, guarding end-to-end determinism.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evals.name: evals.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evals.summary: Vitest unit tests for the eval harness (run-scenario and evaluate-case) using stubbed plan and MCQ generators for deterministic assertions.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: evaluate-case.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: Aggregates deterministic and optional LLM-judge evaluator dimensions for a single eval case into an overall pass/fail scorecard.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: end-state.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: Deterministic evaluator verifying the terminal summary state is schema-valid and that the derived score is consistent with recorded results.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: plan-grounding.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: Deterministic evaluator checking the generated lesson plan is Zod-valid and its objectives are grounded, non-empty content.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: resume-integrity.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: Deterministic evaluator verifying checkpointed graph state survives resume without corruption or lost progress.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: source-anchor.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: Deterministic evaluator confirming every generated MCQ is anchored to a real source quote in pdfText and correctly distributed across objectives.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: index.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: LLM-as-judge evaluators scoring plan/MCQ grounding, assist-firewall leakage, and summary quality, gated behind OpenAI configuration.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/fixtu.name: adversarial-prompts.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/fixtu.summary: Fixture bank of adversarial help-channel prompts that probe the assist firewall for answer leakage.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/fixtu.name: index.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/fixtu.summary: Provides fixture PDFs (easy, dense, messy, minimal) with metadata builders used to exercise eval scenarios against varied source text.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/run-s.name: run-scenario.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/run-s.summary: Drives a single eval scenario through the LangGraph workflow — approving plans, answering MCQs, exercising help turns, and capturing state snapshots for later evaluation.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/run-s.name: run-suite.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/run-s.summary: Runs a filtered set of eval cases end to end and formats an aggregate pass/fail suite report.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/run.t.name: run.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/run.t.summary: CLI entry point that executes the eval suite and prints the formatted report to the console.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.name: adversarial-help.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.summary: Adversarial eval cases that probe the help side-channel for answer leakage using firewall-bypass prompts.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.name: edge-pdfs.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.summary: Eval cases exercising the workflow against edge-case PDFs (dense, messy, minimal) to test grounding robustness.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.name: happy-path.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.summary: The primary happy-path eval cases covering plan approval, correct/incorrect answering, retries, and summarization across normal PDFs.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.name: index.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.summary: Barrel aggregating all eval case suites and providing filter/lookup helpers for selecting cases to run.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.name: resume-integrity.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/scena.summary: Eval cases that interrupt the workflow mid-quiz and resume from checkpoint to verify state integrity.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/types.name: types.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/types.summary: Shared TypeScript types for the eval harness — eval cases, scenario steps, run results, and evaluator check structures.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: generate-mcq.test.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Unit test suite for the generate-mcq node, verifying MCQ batch generation and parsing against fixture stubs.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: generate-mcq.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: LangGraph generative node that produces PDF-grounded MCQs for the current objective via structured LLM generation, with a stub path and source-anchor verification.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: grade.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Deterministic LangGraph node that grades the learner's selected answer in code (never the LLM) and derives the running score.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: plan.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: LangGraph generative node that builds a PDF-grounded lesson plan of learning objectives via structured LLM generation, with a stub fallback path.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.name: summarize.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/nodes.summary: Terminal LangGraph node that assembles a deterministic per-objective score summary and augments it with an LLM-generated narrative closing.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/promp.name: index.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/promp.summary: Central barrel of system prompt constants (plan, MCQ, assist, summarize) that ground the generative nodes in the uploaded PDF text.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.name: annotation.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.summary: Defines the LangGraph State annotation object that is the single source of truth for the teaching workflow and is mirrored to the CopilotKit UI.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.name: co-agent-output-annotation.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.summary: Declares the CoAgent output state annotation projected to the CopilotKit widget, exposing only firewall-safe fields.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.name: constants.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.summary: Shared workflow tuning constants: attempt/help caps, MCQs per objective, objective ceiling, repair retries, and token limits.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.name: derive-score.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.summary: Pure helper that derives the aggregate quiz score (correct vs. total) from the accumulated per-question results.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.name: graph-update.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.summary: State update helpers that wrap node returns with a fresh CoAgent snapshot and seed the initial graph state, keeping the UI mirror in sync.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.name: to-co-agent-state.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/state.summary: Projects internal graph state into the public CoAgent snapshot, stripping answer keys and asserting the firewall that never leaks correctIndex.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/test-.name: test-helpers.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/test-.summary: Test utilities that build a seeded initial graph input from fixture PDF text for exercising the teaching workflow.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.name: assist.types.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.summary: Type definitions for the bounded assist side-channel input, structurally excluding answer-key fields.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.name: grade-answer.types.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.summary: Type definitions describing the deterministic grade-answer result contract used by the grading node.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.name: interrupt.types.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.summary: Type definitions for LangGraph interrupt payloads used at the HITL approval gate and await-input nodes.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.name: message.types.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/agent/types.summary: Type definitions for chat message shapes exchanged between the agent nodes and the UI.

file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.name: assist-leakage.ts
file:apps/edpath-backend/src/evals/evalu.summary: Deterministic eval evaluator that asserts the assist firewall: verifies assist text and the CoAgent snapshot never leak the correct answer, explanation, or hint.

file:apps/edpath-web/app/lesson/[threadI.name: page.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/app/lesson/[threadI.summary: Next.js dynamic route page for a lesson thread; wraps the LessonRunner inside the EdPath CopilotKit provider and app shell, keyed by the threadId route param.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/copilot/.name: EdPathCopilotProvider.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/copilot/.summary: Client provider that mounts CopilotKit for a given thread and wires it to the transport-error context so agent connection failures surface in the UI.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/copilot/.name: copilot-transport-error-context.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/copilot/.summary: React context that captures and exposes CopilotKit agent transport failures, classifying error messages so the UI can render a connection error banner and allow clearing.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Le.name: LessonRunner.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Le.summary: Top-level lesson orchestrator that mirrors LangGraph coagent state into the UI, resolving the current phase to render plan approval, MCQ quiz, generating panels, summary, or error banners.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Le.name: LessonShell.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/Le.summary: Presentational two-column layout shell that places an objective rail beside the main lesson content.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/co.name: coagent-lesson.contract-test.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/co.summary: Compile-time contract test asserting that the useCoAgentLesson hook only exposes public coagent state and does not leak private grading fields.

file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/us.name: useCoAgentLesson.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/components/shell/us.summary: Core CopilotKit CoAgent bridge that mirrors LangGraph lesson state into React and drives the HITL interrupt/resume flow for plan approval and awaited user input.

file:apps/edpath-web/hooks/usePlanRevisi.name: usePlanRevision.tsx
file:apps/edpath-web/hooks/usePlanRevisi.summary: Hook managing the plan-revision chat side-channel: tracks submission state, fingerprints the plan to detect updates, and forwards revision requests to the coagent.

file:apps/edpath-web/lib/copilot.ts.name: copilot.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/lib/copilot.ts.summary: Helper that classifies an error message string as a CopilotKit agent transport failure by matching known connection-failure substrings.

file:apps/edpath-web/lib/lesson-in-progr.name: lesson-in-progress.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/lib/lesson-in-progr.summary: Helper that inspects coagent state to determine whether a lesson has already begun, so the UI avoids re-triggering the start flow.

file:apps/edpath-web/lib/lesson.ts.name: lesson.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/lib/lesson.ts.summary: Parsers and type guards for LangGraph lesson interrupt event values, distinguishing approval interrupts from await-input interrupts and safely decoding their payloads.

file:apps/edpath-web/lib/phase-ui.ts.name: phase-ui.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/lib/phase-ui.ts.summary: Phase-resolution and copy helpers that map coagent lesson state to a UI phase and provide generating/summarizing messages plus error titles for the LessonRunner.

file:apps/edpath-web/lib/plan.ts.name: plan.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/lib/plan.ts.summary: Helper that computes a stable fingerprint of a lesson plan so the UI can detect when the plan has changed after a revision.

file:apps/edpath-web/types/copilot.ts.name: copilot.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/types/copilot.ts.summary: Type definitions for the CopilotKit transport-error context value shared between the provider and its consumers.

file:apps/edpath-web/types/lesson.ts.name: lesson.ts
file:apps/edpath-web/types/lesson.ts.summary: Type definitions for the coagent lesson bridge: interrupt payload values, interrupt bridge props, and the useCoAgentLesson return shape.

document:AGENTS.md.name: AGENTS.md
document:AGENTS.md.summary: Canonical always-on agent rules read by Claude Code and Cursor: defines what EdPath is, the non-negotiable workflow constraints, the tech stack, and a doc map routing each task to the single relevant reference doc.

document:CLAUDE.md.name: CLAUDE.md
document:CLAUDE.md.summary: Thin Claude Code entry document that imports AGENTS.md as the single source of agent rules, reserving this file only for Claude-specific guidance that does not belong in the shared rules.

document:README.md.name: README.md
document:README.md.summary: Primary project README documenting EdPath end to end: product flow, tech stack, system and LangGraph agent architecture, setup, local run instructions, environment variables, persistence, and evals.

config:langgraph.json.name: langgraph.json
config:langgraph.json.summary: LangGraph CLI registration config that declares the 'edpath-agent' graph, pointing to the compiled graph export in the backend and wiring in the backend .env file.

config:package.json.name: package.json
config:package.json.summary: Root monorepo manifest defining npm workspaces (apps/*, packages/*), Turbo-driven build/dev/lint/test scripts, the LangGraph dev command, and shared dev dependencies like Turbo, TypeScript, and Prettier.

config:turbo.json.name: turbo.json
config:turbo.json.summary: Turborepo pipeline configuration defining the task graph and caching for build, lint, check-types, test, and dev across the monorepo workspaces.

config:apps/edpath-backend/.env.example.name: .env.example
config:apps/edpath-backend/.env.example.summary: Environment variable template for the EdPath backend, documenting runtime config for the server (NODE_ENV, PORT), LangGraph deployment, OpenAI models, LangSmith tracing, and PDF upload guardrail limits.

config:apps/edpath-backend/package.json.name: package.json
config:apps/edpath-backend/package.json.summary: Manifest for the edpath-backend Express service, declaring dev/build/start/test/eval scripts and dependencies including LangGraph, CopilotKit runtime, LangChain OpenAI, Express, multer, and pdfjs-dist.

config:apps/edpath-backend/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:apps/edpath-backend/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the backend, extending the shared @repo/typescript-config base and emitting compiled output from src to dist targeting ES2022 with Node types.

document:apps/edpath-web/AGENTS.md.name: AGENTS.md
document:apps/edpath-web/AGENTS.md.summary: Web-app-scoped agent rules warning that this Next.js version has breaking changes and directing agents to read the bundled Next.js docs before writing code.

document:apps/edpath-web/CLAUDE.md.name: CLAUDE.md
document:apps/edpath-web/CLAUDE.md.summary: Thin Claude-specific entry point for the web app that simply imports the shared AGENTS.md rules so guidance lives in a single source.

document:apps/edpath-web/README.md.name: README.md
document:apps/edpath-web/README.md.summary: Overview of the EdPath Next.js front end covering its role as a CopilotKit CoAgent mirror of LangGraph state, a folder map, and the high-level upload-to-summary lesson flow.

config:apps/edpath-web/components.json.name: components.json
config:apps/edpath-web/components.json.summary: shadcn/ui configuration selecting the radix-nova style with RSC/TSX, Tailwind CSS variables, the lucide icon set, and import aliases for components, ui, lib, and hooks.

config:apps/edpath-web/package.json.name: package.json
config:apps/edpath-web/package.json.summary: Package manifest for the edpath-web Next.js app declaring dev/build/test scripts and dependencies including Next 16, React 19, CopilotKit, Radix UI, Tailwind, and workspace packages @repo/schemas, @repo/tokens, and @repo/types.

config:apps/edpath-web/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:apps/edpath-web/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the web app enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution, the Next.js plugin, and the @/* path alias mapped to the app root.

document:docs/architecture/README.md.name: README.md
document:docs/architecture/README.md.summary: Index for the docs/architecture folder, pointing to the canonical reference docs and describing the living code-level maps (repo-map, system-overview) that fill in as the build progresses.

document:docs/architecture/repo-map.md.name: repo-map.md
document:docs/architecture/repo-map.md.summary: Comprehensive code-level map of the EdPath monorepo: end-to-end upload-to-summary flow, backend/web directory maps, graph node IDs, packages, env vars, test/eval entrypoints, and a quick-lookup index of where every concern lives in the code.

document:docs/architecture/system-overvi.name: system-overview.md
document:docs/architecture/system-overvi.summary: Intentional pointer stub that redirects readers to the canonical system-architecture and agent-architecture reference docs and to repo-map.md, avoiding a duplicated overview that would drift.

document:docs/reference/agent-architectu.name: agent-architecture.md
document:docs/reference/agent-architectu.summary: Locked reference for the LangGraph agent design, walking six gates from the agent-level contract through the graph's state object, nodes, edges, interrupts/resume, structured-output ACI contracts, and the reliability spine (bounded loops, failure recovery, tracing, human checkpoint, evals).

document:docs/reference/architecture.md.name: architecture.md
document:docs/reference/architecture.md.summary: Locked reference for EdPath's system architecture: the system-level contract, workflow-not-agent control flow, components and data flow, the CopilotKit bridge, storage (LangGraph Postgres checkpointer), responsibility boundaries, and the locked stack.

document:docs/reference/design-decisions.name: design-decisions.md
document:docs/reference/design-decisions.summary: The canonical log of locked product-behavior decisions: 6 closed philosophy decisions, 24 load-bearing/remaining flow decisions, 9 numeric bounds, and the architecture edits those locks flag in architecture.md and agent-architecture.md.

config:packages/typescript-config/base.j.name: base.json
config:packages/typescript-config/base.j.summary: Base shared TypeScript compiler configuration for the monorepo, enabling strict mode, NodeNext module resolution, declaration output, and safety flags like noUncheckedIndexedAccess; all preset tsconfigs extend it.

config:packages/typescript-config/nextjs.name: nextjs.json
config:packages/typescript-config/nextjs.summary: TypeScript preset for Next.js applications that extends base.json, switching to ESNext/Bundler resolution, enabling the Next plugin, JSX preserve mode, allowJs, and noEmit for the framework build.

config:packages/typescript-config/react-.name: react-library.json
config:packages/typescript-config/react-.summary: TypeScript preset for React library packages that extends base.json and sets JSX to the react-jsx runtime transform.

config:packages/typescript-config/packag.name: package.json

config:packages/schemas/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/schemas/package.json.summary: Package manifest for the shared @repo/schemas workspace package, declaring the Zod dependency and the exports surface consumed by web and backend.

file:packages/schemas/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/index.ts.summary: Barrel entry point for @repo/schemas that re-exports every Zod contract (primitives, lesson-plan, mcq, feedback, summary, resume, upload, error, scoring, constants) as the single source of truth for both ends.

file:packages/schemas/src/primitives.ts.name: primitives.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/primitives.ts.summary: Defines the foundational Zod primitives DifficultySchema and VerdictSchema reused across the higher-level lesson and grading contracts.

file:packages/schemas/src/lesson-plan.ts.name: lesson-plan.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/lesson-plan.ts.summary: Zod contract for the lesson plan, defining ObjectiveSchema and LessonPlanSchema that gate the HITL approval step of the teaching workflow.

file:packages/schemas/src/mcq.ts.name: mcq.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/mcq.ts.summary: Zod contracts for quiz cards: the full MCQSchema, McqBatchSchema, and the PublicMCQSchema that strips correctIndex/explanation/hint for the assist firewall.

file:packages/schemas/src/feedback.ts.name: feedback.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/feedback.ts.summary: Zod contract for grading feedback (FeedbackSchema) returned after each MCQ attempt, carrying verdict and conceptual guidance shapes.

file:packages/schemas/src/error.ts.name: error.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/error.ts.summary: Zod contracts for error handling (ErrorNodeSchema, ErrorKindSchema, LastErrorSchema) that model recoverable failure state in the graph.

file:packages/schemas/src/constants.ts.name: constants.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/constants.ts.summary: Shared workflow constants MAX_ATTEMPTS and MAX_HELP that bound the no-penalty retry loop and the help side-channel.

file:packages/schemas/src/resume.ts.name: resume.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/resume.ts.summary: Zod contracts for the HITL resume side-channel: approval decisions, answer submissions, help messages, advance/retry signals, and the discriminated ResumePayload union that drives graph interrupts.

file:packages/schemas/src/scoring.ts.name: scoring.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/scoring.ts.summary: Zod contracts for deterministic grading output: ObjectiveResult per learning objective and the aggregate Score artifact.

file:packages/schemas/src/summary.ts.name: summary.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/summary.ts.summary: Zod contracts for the end-of-lesson summary: per-objective stats, overall stats, and the composed Summary artifact returned by the summarize node.

file:packages/schemas/src/upload.ts.name: upload.ts
file:packages/schemas/src/upload.ts.summary: Zod contracts for the PDF upload boundary: PdfMeta, the upload-reject reason enum, and the UploadResult returned when a document is accepted or refused.

config:packages/schemas/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/schemas/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared schemas package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.

config:packages/tokens/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/tokens/package.json.summary: Package manifest for the design-tokens package, marking it private and exporting the tokens.css stylesheet for consumers.

file:packages/tokens/tokens.css.name: tokens.css
file:packages/tokens/tokens.css.summary: Design-token stylesheet defining shared CSS custom properties (colors, spacing, typography) consumed across the EdPath UI, including green/red functional feedback tokens.

config:packages/types/package.json.name: package.json
config:packages/types/package.json.summary: Package manifest for the shared types package, declaring its export surface, build script, and the @repo/schemas dependency that its inferred contract types re-export.

file:packages/types/src/feedback-state.c.name: feedback-state.contract-test.ts
file:packages/types/src/feedback-state.c.summary: Compile-time contract test asserting the assist firewall at the type level: exhausted Feedback exposes no correctIndex, and both CoAgentState and EdPathState carry the shared Feedback shape.

file:packages/types/src/ids.ts.name: ids.ts
file:packages/types/src/ids.ts.summary: Defines the shared branded identifier types (ObjectiveId, QuestionId) used to keep objective and question ids type-distinct across the workflow.

file:packages/types/src/index.ts.name: index.ts
file:packages/types/src/index.ts.summary: Barrel that forms the single type-import surface for both web and backend: re-exports Zod-inferred runtime contract types from @repo/schemas plus this package's pure compile-time types (Phase, branded ids, state).

file:packages/types/src/phase.ts.name: phase.ts
file:packages/types/src/phase.ts.summary: Defines the Phase union enumerating the deterministic lesson lifecycle stages (plan, approve, quiz loop, summarize) that drive the LangGraph control flow.

file:packages/types/src/state.ts.name: state.ts
file:packages/types/src/state.ts.summary: Defines the composed CoAgent state types: the full server-side EdPathState (holds pdfText and full MCQs) and the structurally firewalled CoAgentState mirrored to the browser with redacted PublicMCQs.

config:packages/types/tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:packages/types/tsconfig.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared types package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.
